notes: channels.optional = addons that are NOT part of every install, so the client only updates them if the user already has them. This is the two skins + their bundled deps (Arctic Fuse pulls themoviedb.helper/skinvariables/jurialmunkey/six/qrcode/fonts/resources; Nimbus pulls script.nimbus.helper) + the bootstrap-only firstrun. Marking them core would make an Estuary/Nimbus user's 'check updates' list every AF3 dependency as missing. Everything else is core and auto-updates for everyone.
